Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x4000 "SHEEPOIDDX-4000" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Sheepoid DX (Psytronik - 2013).prg"
Metadata.Notes: The game should be dumped at the second break at $4000 to skip the secondary decompression step.
